Let $errs
  Filter((level == "ERROR"))
    Scan(main)
      pushdown.field_predicate: (level == "ERROR")
Sort(+is_50x)
  Aggregate(count() by is_50x)
    Extend(is_50x=if((status >= 500), "yes", "no"))
      Filter((level == "ERROR"))
        Scan(main)
          pushdown.field_predicate: (level == "ERROR")
